sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27367" key="diplasihmio/lios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διπλᾰσι-ημῐόλιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype><sense id="n27367.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"><cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, ἀναλογία</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ratio of</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>, Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:p.110H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.110H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
